entities.description: section filtering is a phase that processes an initial sequence to identify a document s logically hierarchical structure
layout parsing is a method that identifies blocks as title but does not assign their hierarchical level
llm is a model used for analysis to determine hierarchical levels and node types of document candidates
title refers to blocks identified by layout parsing that require hierarchical level assignment
text is a node type used to re classify erroneous title blocks  such as descriptive text within images
image refers to a location within a document where descriptive text might be erroneously parsed as a title
table refers to a document element  specifically borderless table headers  that might be erroneously parsed as a title
b represents the candidate subset of blocks selected for llm based analysis
c represents the content of the candidates analyzed by the llm
f represents the layout features of the candidates analyzed by the llm
4 2 2 is the section identifier for the section filtering phase
b title is a candidate subset of blocks where the type is title  selected for llm based analysis
l represents the actual hierarchical level of a block  ranging from 1 to infinity
1 is the value assigned to the root level in the hierarchical structure
none is a value indicating that a block has no hierarchical level

relations.description: section filtering processes the output of layout parsing to identify hierarchical structure
section filtering utilizes an llm to analyze content and layout features of candidates
layout parsing identifies blocks as title
llm analyzes title candidates to determine their actual hierarchical level and final node type
llm may re classify erroneous title blocks as text
section filtering aims to correct blocks erroneously parsed as title  such as descriptive text within images
section filtering aims to correct blocks erroneously parsed as title  such as borderless table headers
section filtering selects the candidate subset b for analysis
llm determines the hierarchical level l for each candidate
llm analyzes the content c of the candidates
llm analyzes the layout features f of the candidates
section filtering selects the candidate subset b title for analysis
the llm analyzes the candidate subset b title to determine properties
layout parsing identifies blocks as title  forming the subset b title
the llm uses   to identify blocks as title candidates
the parameter l uses 1 to represent the root level
the final node type    can be assigned the value none if a block has no level
section filtering corrects blocks erroneously parsed as title by re classifying them as text
